extraction_reasoning: The litigation table has separate Against and By rows: I counted only Against our Bank and Against our Directors, excluding By our Bank and By our Directors. Criminal proceedings are 1 against the Bank plus 1 against directors = 2; statutory/regulatory proceedings are 12 against the Bank plus 2 against directors = 14; tax proceedings against the Bank are 20, with no subsidiary row disclosed, while the aggregate amount is limited to the Bank's Against amount of ₹40,662.37 million and excludes the directors' ₹5.00 million and all By matters. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total of ₹87,976.96 million as at March 31, 2022, not a re-sum of line items. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue concentration percentage is disclosed; the disclosed percentages concern regional deposits, advances, customers or fee income, not customer concentration. The source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10: ₹40,662.37 million = ₹4,066.237 crore and ₹87,976.96 million = ₹8,797.696 crore.
